PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-31-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Katelyn Wheeler, Esq. counsel for petitioner, Timothy Hogan - by telephone.

Ms. Wheeler advises the Court that an endorsed-filed copy of the petitioner's supplemental declaration has been submitted to the Probate Examiner. The Court takes the matter under submission but advises Ms. Wheeler that if the supplemental declaration is sufficient and the proposed order is in proper form, the Court will grant the petition.

Judge: Hon. Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputies Choi and Nuque; Reporter: Not Reported. (D306)
